elements.description: Typed military memorandum with multiple stamps, handwritten annotations, and signature lines. Contains no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.

judge.reason: Description A claims a visual element (a handwritten signature) while Description B explicitly states the document contains no visual content, creating a direct contradiction on the presence of visual elements.
